nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification for the OpenCode Go Translation & AI Preset. Defines 3 user stories (P1: chapter translation via Go, P2: Go for glossary/rewrite/eval, P3: AI fallback crawling), 9 functional requirements, 4 key entities (GoPreset, TranslateConfig, Config Loading, AI Fallback Crawl Config), 4 success criteria, and edge cases including missing CLI, usage limits, and malformed output.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the OpenCode Go preset feature. Covers technical context (Python 3.10+, PyYAML, ruamel.yaml), constitution checks (all pass), project structure (novel2epub/presets/go.py, config.py extensions, crawler.py ai_fallback), and complexity tracking. Specifies preset definitions in a dedicated module rather than hardcoding in config.py.

nodes.name: research.md
nodes.summary: Phase 0 research resolving 6 unknowns: preset resolution via modular presets/ package, opencode run CLI interface with --model flag, default model selection (deepseek-v4-flash for cost efficiency), Go-optimized prompt templates (shorter, more explicit), AI fallback crawling architecture within HttpCrawler/Crawl4AICrawler, and preset field override rules (user wins over preset).

nodes.name: data-model.md
nodes.summary: Data model for the Go preset feature. Defines GoPreset entity (name, cli.command, cli.model, prompt templates, timeout), TranslateConfig extension with optional preset field (validation: unknown preset raises ValueError, user fields override preset), CrawlConfig extension for P3 (ai_fallback, ai_fallback_max_html), preset resolution flow, and stateless/idempotent state transitions.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Quickstart validation guide with 6 tests: preset activation with minimal config, user field overrides preset, unknown preset raises error, end-to-end chapter title translation with mock CLI, end-to-end chapter translation with mock CLI, and AI fallback crawling (P3 optional). Includes manual validation steps for real end-to-end workflow.

nodes.name: tasks.md
nodes.summary: Task breakdown with 27 tasks across 6 phases: Phase 1 Setup (create presets/ package, go.py, Go-optimized prompts, config extensions), Phase 2 Foundational (wire preset into CLI, unit tests, backward compat), Phase 3 US1 MVP (integration tests, CLI validation, glossary injection, config.example update), Phase 4 US2 (glossary AI, rewrite, evaluation integration tests), Phase 5 US3 (ai_fallback in both crawlers, HTML extraction prompt), Phase 6 Polish (linting, manual validation). All tasks marked [x] as complete.
